table-205-205.caption: What are the ids and texts of paragraphs in the document titled 'Welcome to NY'?
data: New York City, often called NYC, is a vibrant metropolis.
It is home to iconic landmarks like the Statue of Liberty.
Explore diverse neighborhoods, from bustling Manhattan to artistic Brooklyn.
The city offers world-class dining, entertainment, and cultural experiences.
Don't miss a stroll through Central Park or a Broadway show.
Public transportation, especially the subway, is an efficient way to get around.
We hope you enjoy your visit to the Big Apple!
